title: Warehouse Associate
description: Sort, price, and stock donated goods. Operate pallet jacks and maintain clean warehouse environment. Full-time with benefits after 90 days.

title: Forklift Operator
description: Operate sit-down and stand-up forklifts in distribution center. Load and unload trucks. Forklift certification provided on-site.

title: Delivery Driver
description: Pick up donated furniture and household items from homes. Deliver to store locations. Valid driver license required. Background-friendly employer.

title: Production Worker
description: Assembly line work in automotive plant. Repetitive lifting, standing, and hand tool use. Rotating shifts available. Second-chance hiring program.

title: Custodial Technician
description: Clean and maintain commercial office buildings. Evening shift 6pm-2am. Supplies and equipment provided. Fair-chance employer with nationwide locations.

title: Line Cook
description: Prepare menu items on the grill and fryer line. Maintain food safety standards. Fast-paced environment. Experience preferred but will train.

title: Landscaping Crew Member
description: Mow, trim, edge, and maintain commercial properties. Operate string trimmers and blowers. Outdoor work in all weather. No experience needed.

title: Auto Detailer
description: Wash, vacuum, and detail rental vehicles. Inspect for damage. Drive vehicles between locations. Valid license required. Fair-chance employer.

title: Dishwasher / Kitchen Utility
description: Wash dishes, pots, and pans in military dining facility. Maintain clean kitchen environment. Day shift Monday-Friday. Background check with fair-chance policy.

title: Material Handler
description: Load and unload freight in LTL terminal. Use pallet jacks and forklifts. Physical role — lift up to 75 lbs. Night shift differential available.

title: Temp Warehouse Worker
description: Temporary warehouse assignments at multiple Montgomery facilities. Picking, packing, and shipping. Weekly pay. Background-friendly staffing agency.

title: Food Service Worker
company: Compass Group at Baptist Medical Center
description: Prepare and serve meals in hospital cafeteria. Follow dietary guidelines and food safety standards. Day and evening shifts. Fair-chance employer.
